examples: Torrealba belted the ball into the left-field bleachers.
Wires snaked from below the portable green bleachers.
The detailed plans are for the same set of bleachers that sit in the prison yard.
Last week the basketball bleachers were not the only place where scuffles broke out.
It was not something that would fire 'em up in the bleachers (stands, for our British readers).
